title: Communauté de communes d'Yères et Plateaux
summary: The Communauté de communes d'Yères et Plateaux was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in January 2003. It was dissolved in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes d'Yères et Plateaux was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in January 2003. It was dissolved in January 2017.
